headline: Target quietly stops competing with Walmart, Kroger in major area
summary: Target has been suffering through an identity crisis as it switched CEOs and has struggled to rebuild its customer connection. One of new CEO Michael Fiddelke's first priorities has been to clean up the chain's stores by simplifying operations for store managers. “If you’re a store manager now, ...

headline: MarketBeat Week in Review – 03/30 - 04/03
summary: Stocks and the price of oil continue to be inversely linked, and that's likely to remain the case heading into a new earnings season
